g.text: not null unique. Mapped to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS
unique. Prevents duplicate records via NOMIS -> DPS sync
not null. The prison number of the person the CSIP record is for
The prison code where the person was resident at the time the CSIP record was created. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.AGY_LOC_ID
User entered identifier for the CSIP record. Defaults to the prison code. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.CSIP_SEQ
not null. The date the incident that motivated the CSIP referral occurred. Maps to RFR_INCIDENT_DATE
The time the incident that motivated the CSIP referral occurred. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.RFR_INCIDENT_TIME
not null. FK to reference_data. The type of incident that motivated the CSIP referral. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.RFR_INCIDENT_TYPE
not null. FK to reference_data. The location of the incident that motivated the CSIP referral. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.RFR_INCIDENT_LOCATION
not null. The person reporting the incident or creating the CSIP referral. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.RFR_REPORTED_BY
not null. FK to reference_data. The area of work of the person reporting the incident or creating the CSIP referral. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.RFR_CSIP_FUNCTION
not null. The date the CSIP referral was raised. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.RFR_DATE_REPORTED
Was this referral proactive or preventative. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.RFR_PROACTIVE_RESPONSE where the default is 'N'
Were any members of staff assaulted in the incident. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.RFR_STAFF_ASSAULTED where the default is 'N'
Name or names of assaulted members of staff if any. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.RFR_STAFF_NAME. 1000 character limit
The release date of the person in prison. Can be planned released date or the date they were released. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.CDR_RELEASE_DATE. Likely set by another screen in NOMIS
not null. FK to reference_data. The type of involvement the person had in the incident. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.CDR_INVOLVEMENT
not null. The reasons why there is cause for concern. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.CDR_CONCERN_DESCRIPTION
not null. The reasons already known about the causes of the incident or motivation for CSIP referral. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_KNOWN_REASONS
Any other information about the incident or reasons for CSIP referral. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.CDR_OTHER_INFORMATION
Records whether the safer custody team been informed. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.CDR_SENT_DENT where the default is 'N'
Is the referral complete. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.REFERRAL_COMPLETE_FLAG where the default is 'N'
The username of the user who completed the CSIP referral. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.REFERRAL_COMPLETED_BY
The displayable name of the user who completed the CSIP referral. Not mapped
The date the referral was completed. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.REFERRAL_COMPLETED_DATE
not null unique. Mapped to OFFENDER_CSIP_FACTORS
unique. Prevents duplicate contributory factors via NOMIS -> DPS sync
not null. FK to reference_data. The type of contributory factor to the incident or motivation for CSIP referral. Mapped to OFFENDER_CSIP_FACTORS.CSIP_FACTOR
Additional information about the contributory factor to the incident or motivation for CSIP referral. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_FACTORS.COMMENTS
The names of the staff involved in the investigation. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_STAFF_INVOLVED. 4000 character limit
Any evidence that was secured as part of the investigation. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_EVIDENCE_SECURED. 4000 character limit
The reasons why the incident occurred. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_OCCURRENCE_REASON. 4000 character limit
The normal behaviour of the person in prison. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_USUAL_BEHAVIOUR. 4000 character limit
What triggers the person in prison has that could have motivated the incident. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_PERSONS_TRIGGER. 4000 character limit
Any protective factors. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_PROTECTIVE_FACTORS. 4000 character limit
not null. FK to reference_data. The type of outcome of the safer custody screening. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.CDR_OUTCOME
not null. The username of the user who recorded the safer custody screening outcome. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.CDR_OUTCOME_RECORDED_BY
not null. The displayable name of the user who recorded the safer custody screening outcome. Not mapped
not null. The date of the safer custody screening outcome. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.CDR_OUTCOME_DATE
not null. The reasons for the safer custody screening outcome decision. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.CDR_DECISION_REASON. 4000 character limit
not null unique. Mapped to OFFENDER_CSIP_INTVW
unique. Prevents duplicate interviews via NOMIS -> DPS sync
not null. Name of the person being interviewed. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_INTVW.CSIP_INTERVIEWEE
not null. The date the interview took place. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_INTVW.INTVW_DATE
not null. FK to reference_data. What role the interviewee played in the incident or referral. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_INTVW.INTVW_ROLE
Information provided in interview. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_INTVW.COMMENTS. 4000 character limit
not null. The case manager assigned to the CSIP plan. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.CASE_MANAGER
not null. The reasons motivating the creation of a CSIP plan. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.REASON
not null. The first date the CSIP plan should be reviewed. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.CASE_REV_DATE
not null unique. Mapped to OFFENDER_CSIP_PLANS
unique. Prevents duplicate identified needs via NOMIS -> DPS sync
not null. Details of the need identified in the CSIP plan. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_PLANS.IDENTIFIED_NEED. 1000 character limit
not null. The name of the person who is responsible for taking action on the intervention. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_PLANS.BY_WHOM. Who identified the need (free text)
not null. The date the need was identified. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_PLANS.CREATE_DATE. Date the need was identified
not null. The target date the need should be progressed or resolved. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_PLANS.TARGET_DATE. Target date of the identified need
The date the identified need was resolved or closed. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_PLANS.CLOSED_DATE
not null. The planned intervention for the identified need. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_PLANS.INTERVENTION. 4000 character limit
How the plan to address the identified need. is progressing. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_PLANS.PROGRESSION. 4000 character limit
not null unique. Mapped to OFFENDER_CSIP_REVIEWS
unique. Prevents duplicate reviews via NOMIS -> DPS sync
not null. The review number. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REVIEWS.REVIEW_SEQ
The date of the review. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REVIEWS.CREATE_DATE
not null. The username of the person who recorded the review. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REVIEWS.CREATE_USER
not null. The displayable name of the person who recorded the review. Not mapped
The date of the next review. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REVIEWS.NEXT_REVIEW_DATE

If the actions following the review include: informing people responsible for the person in prison, updating the CSIP plan, deciding the person should remain on the CSIP plan, adding a CSIP case note, and closing the CSIP plan. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REVIEWS.PEOPLE_INFORMED, OFFENDER_CSIP_REVIEWS.CSIP_UPDATED, OFFENDER_CSIP_REVIEWS.REMAIN_ON_CSIP, OFFENDER_CSIP_REVIEWS.CASE_NOTE, and OFFENDER_CSIP_REVIEWS.CLOSE_CSIP, which all have default value 'N'
The date the CSIP plan was closed following a review outcome decision to close it. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REVIEWS.CLOSE_DATE
Additional information about the review. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REVIEWS.SUMMARY. 4000 character limit
not null unique. Mapped to OFFENDER_CSIP_ATTENDEES
unique. Prevents duplicate attendees via NOMIS -> DPS sync
not null. Name of review attendee/contributor. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_ATTENDEES.ATTENDEE_NAME
not null. Role of review attendee/contributor. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_ATTENDEES.ATTENDEE_ROLE
If the person attended the review. Indicates that they were a contributor if false. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_ATTENDEES.ATTENDED where the default is 'N'
Description of attendee contribution. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_ATTENDEES.CONTRIBUTION. 4000 character limit
not null composite-unique(domain+code). The NOMIS reference data code for the CSIP_TYP, CSIP_LOC, CSIP_FUNC, CSIP_INV, CSIP_FAC, CSIP_OUT, CSIP_INTVROL, and CSIP_ROLE domain
The conclusion of the referral and reasons for the outcome decision. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_CONCLUSION. 4000 character limit
not null. FK to reference_data. The outcome decision for the referral. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_OUTCOME
FK to reference_data. The role of the person making the outcome decision. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_SIGNED_OFF_BY
The username of the user who recorded the outcome decision. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_OUTCOME_RECORDED_BY
The displayable name of the user who recorded the outcome decision. Not mapped
The date the outcome decision was made. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_OUTCOME_DATE
The next steps that should be taken following the outcome decision. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_NEXT_STEPS. 4000 character limit

An enumeration of actions that may have been recommended ['OPEN_CSIP_ALERT', 'NON_ASSOCIATIONS_UPDATED', 'OBSERVATION_BOOK', 'UNIT_OR_CELL_MOVE', 'CSRA_OR_RSRA_REVIEW', 'SERVICE_REFERRAL', 'SIM_REFERRAL']
Any other actions that are recommended to be considered. Maps to OFFENDER_CSIP_REPORTS.INV_OTHER. 4000 character limit

svg.text: if decision is progress to CSIP
referred person was involved in the indecent as
role of person signing off the referral decision
